    Returns the program exit code.

    Returns the instruction handler associated with the given opcode.

    Returns the instruction handler associated with the given mnemonic.
    getInstructions() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.ConcreteInstructionSet
    Returns an immutable copy of all registered instructions.

    Returns the list of all configured instructions.

    Returns the mnemonic associated with an opcode.

    Returns the current state of the negative flag.

    Returns the opcode associated with a mnemonic.

    Returns the current state of the overflow flag.

    Returns the current programme counter.

    Returns the current programme counter.

    Returns the value stored in this specified register.

    Returns the value stored in the specified register.
